title: Post-restart reconciliation: RnS incident hygiene + stale canonical-repo doc
description: Cluster found after the RnS watcher was revived (2026-07-02 ~13:05) and probe-resumed stale incidents: (1) watcher resurrected codex-lab-limo and tried claude-lab-rose (launch_blocked) although both were superseded by the 08:27 lab restart; (2) watcher opened an incident for scratch-peso, a disposable TASK-089 test agent that was deliberately killed, probes_sent=1; (3) shared/canonical-repo.md still names /home/home/Downloads/MultiAgentProject as canonical and forbids pushing from Projects -- but that path no longer exists, every live session runs in /home/home/Projects/MultiAgentProject, and three authorized pushes went out from it today; the doc was never refreshed after TASK-079 completed. Remediation: record durable inactive/session_ended statuses for claude-lab-rose and scratch-peso at the SQLite source + export (suppresses watcher probes per its reason-field contract); clear the scratch-peso incident from limit-watcher-state.json with the watcher stopped, then restart it; refresh canonical-repo.md to post-TASK-079 reality ONLY after bigboss confirms (hcom request pending); capture the watcher-resurrects-superseded/disposable-sessions gap as an emergence idea for a v2.2 fix.
acceptance_criteria: rose and scratch-peso have durable inactive statuses with reasons; watcher no longer probes either
Watcher restarted cleanly; state file has no incidents for dead-on-purpose sessions
canonical-repo.md updated only after explicit bigboss confirmation, with HPOM headers refreshed
Emergence idea filed for the RnS superseded/disposable-session gap
